final:
module top_module(
    input [3:0] data_in_0,
    input [3:0] data_in_1,
    input [3:0] data_in_2,
    input [3:0] data_in_3,
    input [1:0] select,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);always @(*) begin
    case (select)
        2'b00: data_out = data_in_0;
        2'b01: data_out = data_in_1;
        2'b10: data_out = data_in_2;
        2'b11: data_out = data_in_3;
    endcase
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      data_out <= data_in_0; // This should never be executed
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: data_out <= data_in_0; // This should never be executed
